title: Snake Game Clientside
description: Adds a clientside snake game which you can play if you get bored or are waiting for something.
body:
Adds the classic snake game to Minecraft, which you can play using the /clientsnake command. It is purely clientside and so nice if you are waiting for something or bored. ![The game underway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7282b8fca2a8b5b09cf8b76abb4f64be037196d3_0.webp) Has a few persistent settings: - Speed: The number of milliseconds between snake updates - Show Pointers: Wether to show the direction of each snake element using the < ^ > and V characters - Show In Chat: Whether to inform you of your score when you die - Show Stats: Whether to display your current & highest scores as you play - Digest: Whether to show the eating animation To open the game, type the command /clientsnake To move use the 4 arrow keys For help type /clientsnake help To set the speed type /clientsnake speed
The speed is the rate at which the snake game updates, in milliseconds, meaning a speed of 1000 is one update per second, whereas 50 is 20 updates per second. It defaults to 120. To toggle the other settings use the command /clientsnake , the options will show as suggestions. To see your highest score use the commmand /clientsnake highscore ![The game whilst being played](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e238dec5c2e21f54f85b33068c30f698f8261c01_0.webp)
